title: Laptop running slow - Need performance optimization
description: My laptop has been running extremely slow for the past week. Applications take a long time to open and system frequently freezes. Need IT team to check and optimize performance.

comments.message: We've received your ticket. Our technician will visit your desk tomorrow at 3 PM to diagnose the issue.

title: Access request to Marketing shared drive
description: I need access to the Marketing shared drive for the Q4 campaign project. Currently getting 'Access Denied' error when trying to open the folder.

title: Payslip for September not reflecting bonus
description: My September payslip doesn't show the quarterly bonus that was announced. Please check and update the payslip.

comments.message: We're checking with finance team. Bonus was processed but might reflect in October salary.
Confirmed - bonus will be credited in October salary along with arrears. Updated payslip will be available by Oct 10th.

title: Request for standing desk in workspace
description: I would like to request a standing desk setup for my workstation. I have back issues and doctor has recommended alternating between sitting and standing while working.

title: VPN connection issues from home
description: Unable to connect to company VPN from home. Getting 'Connection timeout' error. Tried restarting router but issue persists.

comments.message: Please try updating your VPN client to the latest version from the IT portal.
Updated the client and it's working now. Thanks!
Great! Closing this ticket. Feel free to reopen if issue persists.
